property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

odejs\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\Program Files\Calibre2\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Tailscale\;C:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2025b in;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Users\xioni\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Users\xioni\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\;C:\Users\xioni\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\xioni\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\xioni\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\xioni\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\xioni\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\xioni\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\xioni\.dotnet	ools;c:\Users\xioni\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Message is succesfully saved in database
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Message is succesfully saved in database &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogRepository.feature:6&amp#27;[0m No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe database is operational&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.databaseIsOperational()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma validated log message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"System start"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with level &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"INFO"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m exists&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.validatedMessageExists(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Test-mode: Simulating saving to database. &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe log message is sent to the repository&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.messageToRepository()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma new row should exist in the logs table&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.validateCreateNewRow()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe saved message should match &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"System start"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.verifySavedMessages(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m >>> Cleaning done. DatabaseUrl is reverted.
testcase.system-err: Clear error: No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db

testcase.name: Message is disregarded if database is not operational
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Message is disregarded if database is not operational &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogRepository.feature:13&amp#27;[0m No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma validated log message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Error test"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with level &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ERROR"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m exists&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.validatedMessageExists(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe database is not operational&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.notOperationalDatabase()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma log message arrives we should expect it to not be saved&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.attemptToSave()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe log message should be denied&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.verifyNothingSaved()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser should get message describing that database is not operational&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogRepositorySteps.verifyErrorMessage()&amp#27;[0m >>> Cleaning done. DatabaseUrl is reverted.
testcase.system-err: Clear error: No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db Database error: No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db

testcase.name: Successful validation #1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Successful validation &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogValidation.feature:13&amp#27;[0m No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlog message is received by log validation&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_received_by_log_validation()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma log message is created with time &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"2026-02-11T11:00:00"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"System start"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and level &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"INFO"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_correctly_formatted(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe log message should be accepted&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.verify_acceptance()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user should get a confirmation message&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.verify_acceptance_confirmation()&amp#27;[0m >>> Cleaning done. DatabaseUrl is reverted.
testcase.system-err: Clear error: No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db feb. 15, 2026 11:41:29 FM org.hibernate.validator.internal.util.Version <clinit> INFO: HV000001: Hibernate Validator 9.1.0.Final

testcase.name: Failed validation due to missing data #1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Failed validation due to missing data &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogValidation.feature:23&amp#27;[0m No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlog message is received by log validation&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_received_by_log_validation()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma log message is created with time &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m""&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"System start"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and level &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"DEBUG"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_correctly_formatted(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe log message should be rejected due to missing data&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.deny_acceptance()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user should get a rejection message describing the error&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.send_rejection_confirmation()&amp#27;[0m >>> Cleaning done. DatabaseUrl is reverted.

testcase.name: Failed validation due to missing data #2
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Failed validation due to missing data &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogValidation.feature:24&amp#27;[0m No suitable driver found for jdbc:sqlite:my.db &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlog message is received by log validation&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_received_by_log_validation()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma log message is created with time &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"2026-02-11"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m""&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and level &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ERROR"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_correctly_formatted(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe log message should be rejected due to missing data&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.deny_acceptance()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user should get a rejection message describing the error&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.send_rejection_confirmation()&amp#27;[0m >>> Cleaning done.
